title: Clothing Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Clothing Donation Programs 103 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Disaster/Emergency Issues Infants/Toddlers Men Pregnant Individuals Women Youth Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts small donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, clothing, small appliances, compact furniture, and household goods. Cannot accept large appliances or big furniture. Supports individuals and families impacted by the March 2025 floods in Douglas County. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALLEN TEMPLE EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pre-made food boxes and clothing assistance. Accepts donations of peanut butter, toilet paper, paper towels, and socks. 4214 NE 8th Avenue Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday/Saturday 11am-2pm. Closed first week of every month. (503) 284-1010 Get Directions More Details BETHEL BAPTIST CHURCH COMMUNITY OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry and clothing closet. Also accepts donations of clothing. Donations must be clean and in good repair. 645 Cleveland Street Aumsville, OR 97325 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Food pantry: 2nd and 4th Thursdays of the month noon-4pm Clothing closet: 3rd Saturday of the month 10am-noon. Closed during the month of August. Clothing donations: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 749-2128 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BROOKINGS CORE RESPONSE PEER HOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER PEER HOUSE DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, personal grooming supplies, and pet food. Does not accept open or used personal grooming supplies. 16389 Highway 101 S Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Email (541) 251-0825 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, household goods (including kitchen items), bedding and linens, and other items. Accepts donations of men's clothing, kitchenware, small appliances, bedding and linens, and bathroom supplies. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES EUGENE CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with clothing, personal hygiene products, diapers, and showers. Helps connect individuals with other community resources and access mainstream benefits, including assistance with SNAP applications and local transit single-ride bus passes (which can be requested twice per month, subject to availability). Also, assists in completing forms to obtain ID and birth certificates, including limited payment assistance. Accepts donations of food, clothing, and other items. 1464 W 6th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with clothing, personal hygiene products, diapers, and showers. Helps connect individuals with other community resources and access mainstream benefits, including assistance with SNAP applications and local transit single-ride bus passes (which can be requested twice per month, subject to availability). Also, assists in completing forms to obtain ID and birth certificates, including limited payment assistance. Accepts donations of food, clothing, and other items. 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHANCE 2ND CHANCE SHELTER EMERGENCY SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides shelter for a maximum capacity of 20 individuals. Laundry, mail, hygiene items, a clothing closet, transitional housing, and other supportive services are available to guests. Accepts donations of hygiene items and new or used (must be laundered in advance) clothing. 1100 Jackson Street SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Persons with sex offender or arson convictions are ineligible. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 967-8545 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, hygiene items as available, and household goods, including bedding and kitchenware. Diapers are available through PDX Diaper Bank. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and household items. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clothing and Hygiene supplies: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONTROVERSIAL COFFEE CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Queer owned and operated coffee shop that maintains a clothing closet with gently used, clean clothing and a small food pantry that is subject to availability. Also hosts a community night, providing a safe place for the LGBTQ2SIA+ community to gather and enjoy games and activities. Individuals may request a "Pay It Forward" meal, which covers the cost of a beverage and small food item. Accepts donations of gently used clean clothing, non-perishable food items, and a "Pay It Forward," meal, which covers the cost of a beverage and small food item. 111 Broadway Street Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Monday-Friday 7am-7pm Saturday-Sunday 7am-8pm -Queer Community Night: Monday 6pm-8pm Email (503) 739-0158 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COOS BAY SEVENTH DAY ADVENTIST FOOD PANTRY CLOTHES CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet. Also accepts donations of clean clothing. 2175 Newmark Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be at or below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Tuesday 9am-11am Email (541) 294-4623 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DALLAS EVANGELICAL CHURCH COMMUNITY CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, towels and linens. Donations accepted. 783 SW Church Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Wednesday 9am-noon, Thursday 7pm-9pm, Friday-Saturday 9am-noon, as long as approved volunteer leaders are available Email (503) 623-3778 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DAYTON COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet with coats and shoes. Items available are dependent on donations and funding. Also accepts donations. 300 Flower Lane Dayton, OR 97114 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (503) 569-8788 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DRAIN FISH FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET DRAIN FISH FOOD PANTRY & CLOTHES CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food and clothing. Also accepts donations of food and clothing. No furniture donations. 128 W C Avenue Drain, OR 97435 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 9am-1pm Email (541) 836-2212 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DRESS FOR SUCCESS OREGON DONATION CALL OUT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of business casual, casual, and trade clothing, scrubs, coats, shoes, purses, backpacks, new undergarments, makeup, toiletries, and jewelry. 1532 NE 37th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donations are accepted on monthly donation days Email (503) 249-7300 107 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ELEVATE HIM PROFESSIONAL CLOTHING AND HAIRCUTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides interview and work-ready clothing to help with the transition into the workforce and for appointments that require a professional appearance. Also provides professional haircuts. Clothing donations accepted. 1513 SW Marlow Avenue Suite A Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: Males age 12 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm by appointment Email (503) 810-1607 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people donating furniture and appliances to those needing those items. Small items like blankets and hygiene items can be brought to the Family Resource Center. 3520 Frontage Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 271-9700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOREST GROVE ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICE CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and accepts donations of clothing. Quilts and blankets available as supplies allow. 1950 Mountain View Lane Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 10am-noon. Closed the month of July. Email (503) 357-9797 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FRANCIS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 3-day emergency food supply to individuals and families once every 30 days. Unhoused individuals may come once per week. Also offers used clothing, personal hygiene items, and blankets as available. Guests receiving food are served outside of the facility. Clothing is available inside the center for one guest at a time. Accepts food and clothing donations. 6535 SE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1:30pm Email (503) 775-6784 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FREE CLOTHING EXCHANGE NORTH PORTLAND FREE CLOTHING EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community exchange event every other month for receiving and/or donating men's, women's, and children's clothing. 2115 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97217 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 3rd Sunday of the month 2pm-4pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store whose proceeds benefit domesticated animals in Lincoln County, both those housed at the Lincoln County Animal Shelter and those living in community households. Accepts donations of clean and working small kitchen appliances, bedding or linen, toys/games, books clothing, kitchenware and other small household items. 558 NE 1st Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Friday-Saturday 10am-4pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3:30pm Email (541) 574-1861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLADSTONE PARK COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food, clothing, bedding, and linen. Families and individuals can visit the food pantry once per month. Clothing, bedding, and linen offered weekly, depending upon availability. Donations accepted. 8372 Cason Road Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Wednesday 9am-1pm Email (503) 655-4968 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLEANERS OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY INC FOOD SHARE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Membership-based food share program. Operates through donations from retailers, wholesalers, distributors, manufacturers, and farms. Each member household shares a portion of food with an approved adoptee. Also operates a clothing center for members. Food and clothing donations welcome. Volunteer opportunities available. 13821 Fir Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Must meet HUD low-income guidelines Hours: Business Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Member Resource Center: Monday-Thursday 8am-1pm Closed for major holidays and severe weather Email (503) 655-8740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store generates revenue to support the Gospel Rescue Mission, provides work opportunities for Mission residents, accepts donations of goods from community members, and provides assistance to those in need through a clothing voucher program. 429 SE 6th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm (541) 479-9748 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRACE CHRISTIAN FELLOWSHIP FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHES CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry and clothes closet. Also accepts donations of food, clothes, and money. 7325 N Bank Street Portland, OR 972035032 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday noon-12:30pm, Thursday noon-2pm, Sunday 11:30am-noon Email (503) 286-2085 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HARMONY UNITED METHODIST CHURCH FELLOWSHIP MEAL AND CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a weekly community meal for either eating on-site or take-out. Also provides a clothing closet with coats and shoes available dependent upon donations/funding. The clothing closet accepts donations. 123 Ocean Boulevard SE Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Saturday 11am-1pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOPE ON THE HILL FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A shopping-style pantry and clothing closet (items may include adult and children's clothing and personal care items). One food box or clothing closet visit a month per family. 500 NW Hill Road McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry: Tuesday 11am-1pm, Thursday 6pm-8pm Clothing Closet: Saturday 10am-noon Donations: Tuesday 11am-1pm, Thursday 6pm-8pm or by appointment Email (503) 472-8476 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store that sells donated items, including clothing, furniture, household items, sporting goods, and other items. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER WORKER OF THE DAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help navigating resources in the community, information about coordinated access, and information and referral services. Assists on a first-come, first-serve basis with resource information and referral. Supplies fluctuate, but when available may provide Trimet day passes, hygiene items, water/snacks, and clothing. Referrals given for services or items of need that are not accessible through the agency. Donations of unisex clothing and household item are accepted. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Office: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Donations: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 721-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, bedding, linens, gift cards, or money. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Corvallis: Tuesday-Wednesday 10am-1pm at 225 SW 4th Street, Corvallis, OR 97333 Albany Public Library: Thursday 10am-1pm at 2450 14th Avenue SE, Albany, OR 97322 Email (541) 760-5825 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOIN JOIN DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, blankets, sleeping bags, tarps, camping equipment, socks, underwear, hats, gloves, jackets, and hygiene items (shampoo, conditioner, razors, deodorant, feminine products, etc.) 1435 NE 81st Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed on national holidays. Email (971) 710-5768 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a donation point to drop off items such as clothing, hygiene products, pet supplies, and more. Also accepts financial donations. 12264 SW Hall Boulevard Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Small item donations (such as hygiene products and pet supplies): Drop off Monday 11am-1pm or by appointment -Large item donations (such as furniture, kitchen appliances, and large clothing donations): Drop off by appointment only Email (503) 624-4666 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUST PORCH IT JUST PORCH IT AND ECO WORLD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides no-contact pickup service for clothing, backpacks, belts, accessories, fabric, hats, purses, shoes, bedding, linens, towels, knickknacks, and small household items to be recycled and repurposed. Also has donation bins for drop off. Serves as a source for local school and church closets, non-profits, disaster relief victims, and thrift stores. Items deemed as unusable are recycled and kept out of landfills. Eligibility: Reusable items for donation, or items that have holes, stains, or are damaged that can be recycled. Does not accept items that are wet or moldy. Hours: Pickup: Varies Phone: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Donation bins: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (800) 965-6519 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith based support group that focuses on goal setting and planning. Participants can attend the annual infant and children's clothing swap and baby shower. Offers information on additional community resources. Accepts gently used maternity clothing and baby furniture and clothing. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Single and pregnant women Hours: Monday 6pm and Tuesday 5pm Email (971) 420-6801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people with local churches and service agencies. Basic goods and services are offered to clients as they are donated. Services available may include, but are not limited to: bicycles, breakfast/lunch bags, clothing closets (adults and children), community meals, counseling services, diapers, haircuts, H.U.G.S. (hats, umbrellas, gloves, scarves, and socks), kitchen supplies, laundry service, bedding/linens, personal grooming supplies/toiletries, over-the-counter medications, personal care kits, physical therapy, showers, water bill assistance, and firewood. Accepts donations of bedding and linen, clothing, and personal grooming supplies. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF GREATER HILLSBORO GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential household items, including beds and bedding, linens, furniture, clothing, diapers, hygiene products, cleaning and laundry supplies, paper goods, and work boots. Donations are accepted of the items the agency distributes, with an ongoing need for couches, kitchen tables, and queen-size or smaller beds (including mattresses, box springs, and frames). Referrals to local food pantries are available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday noon-2:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9:30am-noon Email (503) 917-0205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MAINSPRING PORTLAND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a shopping-style clothing and personal hygiene pantry, overnight food bags, and mobile food pantry. Participants can access food bags once per week, mobile destination food pantries as often as needed, and clothing/hygiene items once every 14 days. Five additional open-air farmers market mobile destination food pantries are held monthly at various Portland locations. Caseworkers are encouraged to shop for their clients and anyone homebound. 3500 NE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry: Pre-made bags of food available upon request Thursday 9am-1pm Clothing Pantry: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm (15-minute shopping slots) Donations: Monday-Thursday 9am-1pm Caseworkers and social workers shopping for clients: Thursday 7:30am-9am Closed on holidays and follows Portland Public Schools inclement weather guidelines Email (503) 233-5533 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARION CHURCH OF GOD ABUNDANCE CLOTHING MINISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used clothing (brand new socks and underwear). Sizes range from infant to adult plus sizes. Availability may be dependent on supply. Accepts donations of gently used clothing. 7478 Stayton Road SE Marion, OR 97392 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 769-9663 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARLA'S MALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with books, toys, household items, new hygiene products, knick-knacks, and clothing including interview or work-appropriate attire. Offers volunteer work experience and credit recovery for students working at the store. Also accepts donations of new and gently used items. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 8am-11am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays. Hours are subject to change. Summer hours: June 16th-July 17th Monday-Thursday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 524-2309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides maternity clothing and supplies for pregnant women and nursing mothers. Also provides baby clothing, baby blankets, sleepers, toys and children's books, as well as emergency supplies of diapers, formula, and baby food. Strollers, infant bathtubs, car seats, and pack and plays available dependent on availability. Parents are encouraged to become a client (which is free) and allows access to more services. Diapers and formula are available for emergency needs only and not provided on an ongoing basis. Mother & Child is not a clothing closet; it is a program which has supplies to assist families but also focuses on education and support. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Pregnant or parents/primary caregivers of a child aged birth to 5 years old. No eligibility requirements based on income. The client must be able to come to the Mother and Child Education Center to receive services. Diapers, clothing, and other goods cannot be mailed or delivered to clients. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday 10am-2pm Email (503) 249-5801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MY FATHER'S HOUSE MY FATHER'S HOUSE DONATION CENTER DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, cleaning supplies, paper products, diapers, office supplies, wrapping paper, bus tickets, grocery gift cards, and new toys. 5003 W Powell Boulevard Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-1pm (503) 492-3046 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR NEXT DOOR WASCO CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 1113 Kelly Avenue The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 296-8118 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION OF CENTRAL OREGON OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION THRIFT STORE MADRAS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-cost clothing, furniture, household items, appliances, books, and videos. Accepts donations including large furniture. 1412 SW Highway 97 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Stores: Monday 9am-3pm and Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 475-6961 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION OF CENTRAL OREGON OPPORTUNITY FOUNDATION THRIFT STORE REDMOND THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-cost clothing, furniture, household items, appliances, books, and videos. Accepts donations including large furniture. 3294 S Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday 9am-3pm, Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 548-5288 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUR JUST FUTURE DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, personal hygiene products, household cleaning products, diapers, formula, baby powder, wipes, underwear, bras, socks, sleepwear, and cold weather gear. Also offers volunteer opportunities. 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (971) 610-1827 Get Directions Visit Website More Details P:EAR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center that offers arts and music, mentoring, educational, and outdoor recreational programs. Additional supportive services include bus tickets, haircuts, clothing, and support for pregnancy and parenting. Also offers meals and cooking classes. Accepts donations of food, clothing, and camping gear. 338 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Ages 15-24 experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday-Friday: 9am-2pm Breakfast at 9am and lunch at noon to those served by p:ear Donations: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (503) 228-6677 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICES PORTLAND ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICES THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store with clothing, luggage, handbags, books, sheet music, household goods, and furniture. Donations accepted on-site. 11020 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm, Sunday 11am-4pm Donation drop-off: Monday-Thursday 9am-1pm, Sunday 11am-2pm Closed major holidays Email (503) 252-8500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND PUBLIC SCHOOLS BENSON POLYTECHNIC HIGH SCHOOL AT MARSHALL CAMPUS PTA CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet for families with school-aged children. Donations accepted. 3905 SE 91st Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday/Thursday 10am-1pm beginning Thursday, September 4, 2025 through Thursday, April 30, 2026 Email (503) 916-5100 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), men's, women's, and children's clothing, travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION SHEPHERD'S DOOR DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), men's, women's, and children's clothing, travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 13207 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 1:15pm-3:45pm Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PRINEVILLE CHURCH CLOTHING MINISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet and accepts gently used clothing donations. 1095 NE 3rd Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 10am-2pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROFESSIONAL WOMEN'S CLOTHES CLOSET CLOTHING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides shoes and clothing for women seeking professional apparel for work. Clothing donations accepted. 14700 SE Rupert Drive Oak Grove, OR 97267 Eligibility: Women in need of clothing and shoes Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (503) 654-3161 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND DONATION DROP OFF DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of new, unopened, and full-size personal hygiene products such as shampoo, conditioner, and body wash. Also accepts toothpaste and toothbrushes, baby hygiene products, natural household cleaning products, high-efficiency laundry detergent, new pillows, new socks and undergarments (for adults and children), twin sheets and blankets, and kitchenware. Does not accept travel-size toiletries, used clothing or shoes, used toys, furniture, cell phones, or any item not in good, clean, working condition. 6161 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st Thursday of the month 11am-1pm, 3rd Thursday of the month 4pm-6pm Email (503) 243-5159 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details REACHING OUR COMMUNITY ROC RESALE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with used clothing and toys. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and toys. Clothing vouchers are available. 564 SW Foundry Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing Vouchers: Women and children Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 476-3344 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of camping gear (tents and sleeping bags), clothing (socks, underwear, shoes, men’s and women’s apparel), bedding (pillows and blankets), toiletries (soap, shampoo, conditioner, toothbrushes, toothpaste, deodorant, body wipes), food (cooked or uncooked), and operational supplies (55-gallon trash bags, paper plates, plastic cutlery). Cash or check donations can be made onsite to support utility and material needs; receipts are available at the front desk. Financial donations may also be mailed to the registered office or made online.
